intro: Tithymalus welwitschii, also known as Euphorbia welwitschii, is a succulent plant species native to tropical Africa. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The bioactive constituents of Tithymalus welwitschii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional African medicine, Tithymalus welwitschii is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments to treat a range of health issues.
